iwanttohitfromthreeblocks.description: A PVP mod that visualizes your attack reach with dynamic 3D block overlays and a color-changing crosshair, allowing you to practice better by adjusting tolerance based on your reaction time.
iwanttohitfromthreeblocks.config.openLog: Click here to view your logs
